Name: Argo CSV-SM
Description:
Manufacturer: Argo Astronautics
Focus: Light Freight

You got your plot of land, you’ve got the right construction materials, and now you’re ready to watch your dreams take shape. The ideal companion to the CSV-FM, the CSV Supply Model provides additional storage for all the resources required to build your next settlement.
